---
title: "Journey"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

/* Full-width grid override for journey page only */
.page-columns {
  grid-template-columns: [screen-start] 0 [screen-start-inset] 0 [page-start] 0 [page-start-inset] 0 [body-start-outset] 0 [body-start] 0 [body-content-start] 1fr [body-content-end] 0 [body-end] 0 [body-end-outset] 0 [page-end-inset] 0 [page-end] 0 [screen-end-inset] 0 [screen-end] !important;
}

#quarto-document-content {
  grid-column: screen-start / screen-end !important;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  padding-left: clamp(0.2rem, 0.55vw, 0.7rem) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(0.2rem, 0.55vw, 0.7rem) !important;
}

main.content.column-page {
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
}

:root {
  --journey-accent: #2563eb;
  --journey-bg-primary: var(--bs-body-bg, #ffffff);
  --journey-bg-secondary: var(--bs-tertiary-bg, #f5f5f4);
  --journey-text-primary: var(--bs-body-color, #1c1917);
  --journey-text-secondary: var(--bs-secondary-color, #57534e);
  --journey-border: var(--bs-border-color, #e7e5e4);
  --journey-stop-idle-bg: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.06);
  --journey-stop-idle-border: rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.16);
  --journey-stop-hover-bg: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.12);
}

body.quarto-dark {
  --journey-bg-secondary: rgba(31, 41, 55, 0.92);
  --journey-border: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);
  --journey-stop-idle-bg: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.08);
  --journey-stop-idle-border: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2);
  --journey-stop-hover-bg: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.16);
}

.journey-page {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0.9rem 0 4.5rem;
}

.journey-page.page-columns {
  display: block !important;
  grid-template-columns: none !important;
}

.journey-page.page-columns > * {
  grid-column: auto !important;
}

.journey-kicker,
.journey-sidebar-heading {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
}

.journey-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  color: var(--journey-accent);
}

.journey-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.6vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.05;
}

.journey-intro {
  max-width: 44rem;
  margin: 0 0 1.15rem;
  color: var(--journey-text-secondary);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.journey-layout {
  display: flex;
  gap: clamp(0.55rem, 0.8vw, 0.8rem);
  align-items: start;
}

.journey-layout.page-columns {
  display: flex !important;
  grid-template-columns: none !important;
}

.journey-layout.page-columns > * {
  grid-column: auto !important;
}

.journey-panel,
.timeline-stop {
  border: 1px solid var(--journey-border);
  border-radius: 1.25rem;
  background: var(--journey-bg-secondary);
}

.journey-detail {
  flex: 0 0 17.0rem;
  max-width: 17.0rem;
  padding: 1rem;
  min-height: 0;
  align-self: start;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease;
}

.journey-detail-year {
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.journey-detail-title-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.journey-detail-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--journey-text-primary);
}

.journey-detail-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.journey-detail-role {
  margin: 0 0 0.85rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--journey-text-primary);
}

.journey-detail-copy {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--journey-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  white-space: pre-line;
}

.journey-map-panel {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

.journey-map-shell {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 1rem;
  aspect-ratio: 1.92 / 1;
  border: 1px solid rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.18);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.08), rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.02));
}

body.quarto-dark .journey-map-shell {
  border-color: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.18);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18), transparent 34%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.96), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.98));
}

.journey-reset {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0.85rem;
  left: 0.85rem;
  z-index: 3;
  padding: 0.45rem 0.8rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--journey-border);
  border-radius: 0.8rem;
  background: var(--journey-bg-primary);
  color: var(--journey-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease;
}

.journey-reset:hover,
.journey-reset:focus {
  color: var(--journey-text-primary);
}

.journey-map-svg {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  color: var(--journey-text-primary);
}

.journey-map-loading {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 1rem;
  color: var(--journey-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
}

.journey-map-loading[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

.journey-map-photo {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 2;
  width: 11.75rem;
  height: 8rem;
  padding: 0.3rem;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 0.8rem;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
  background: #ffffff;
}

body.quarto-dark .journey-map-photo {
  border-color: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.3);
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg);
}

.journey-map-photo[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

.journey-map-photo img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: contain;
  object-position: center;
  border-radius: 0.55rem;
  display: block;
}

.journey-sidebar {
  flex: 0 0 17.0rem;
  max-width: 17.0rem;
  padding: 0.1rem 0 0;
}

.journey-sidebar-heading {
  color: var(--journey-text-secondary);
  margin: 0 0 0.85rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.journey-stops {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.45rem;
}

.timeline-stop {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
  text-align: left;
  border: 1px solid var(--journey-stop-idle-border);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: var(--journey-stop-idle-bg);
  color: var(--journey-text-primary);
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease;
}

.timeline-stop:hover,
.timeline-stop:focus {
  border-color: rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.28);
  background: var(--journey-stop-hover-bg);
}

.timeline-stop.is-active {
  border-color: var(--stop-color);
  background: var(--stop-tint);
}

.timeline-topline {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.65rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.timeline-dot {
  width: 0.6rem;
  height: 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  background: var(--stop-color);
}

.timeline-city-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.timeline-city {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.96rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--journey-text-primary);
}

.timeline-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.45rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
}

.timeline-label,
.timeline-year {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--journey-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.map-country,
.map-state,
.route-line {
  transition: fill 0.2s ease, stroke 0.2s ease, stroke-width 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease;
}

.route-line {
  fill: none;
  stroke: rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.22);
  stroke-width: 1;
  stroke-dasharray: 5 4;
  stroke-linecap: round;
}

.map-stop {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.map-stop .stop-ring,
.map-stop .stop-core {
  transition: r 0.2s ease, fill 0.2s ease, stroke 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, filter 0.2s ease;
}

.map-stop .marker-emoji,
.map-stop .marker-city,
.map-stop .marker-label {
  transition: fill 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, font-size 0.2s ease;
}

.map-stop .stop-ring {
  fill: transparent;
  stroke: var(--stop-color);
  stroke-width: 1.4;
  opacity: 0.4;
}

.map-stop .stop-core {
  fill: var(--stop-color);
  stroke: #ffffff;
  stroke-width: 1.5;
}

.map-stop .marker-emoji,
.map-stop .marker-city,
.map-stop .marker-label {
  user-select: none;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.map-stop .marker-emoji {
  font-size: 13px;
}

.map-stop .marker-city {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  fill: var(--journey-text-primary);
}

.map-stop .marker-label {
  font-size: 10px;
  fill: var(--journey-text-secondary);
}

.map-stop.is-active .stop-ring,
.map-stop:hover .stop-ring,
.map-stop:focus .stop-ring {
  opacity: 0.8;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .journey-layout,
  .journey-layout.page-columns {
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .journey-detail,
  .journey-sidebar {
    flex: 1 1 auto;
    max-width: none;
    width: 100%;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .journey-page {
    padding: 2.5rem 1rem 4rem;
  }

  .journey-map-panel,
  .journey-sidebar,
  .journey-detail {
    padding: 0.95rem;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="journey-page">
  <p class="journey-kicker">Journey</p>
  <p class="journey-title">From the island to the lab.</p>
  <!-- <p class="journey-intro">
    Every stop shaped how I work and who I am. Click a marker or stop to zoom in.
  </p> -->
  <div class="journey-layout">
    <aside class="journey-panel journey-detail" id="journey-detail">
      <!-- <p class="journey-detail-year" id="journey-detail-year">Before college</p> -->
      <div class="journey-detail-title-row">
        <p class="journey-detail-title" id="journey-detail-title">Select a stop</p>
        <span class="journey-detail-badge" id="journey-detail-badge" hidden>Upcoming</span>
      </div>
      <p class="journey-detail-role" id="journey-detail-role" hidden></p>
      <p class="journey-detail-copy" id="journey-detail-copy">
        Every stop shaped how I work and who I am. Click a marker or stop to zoom in.
      </p>
    </aside>

    <div class="journey-panel journey-map-panel">
      <div class="journey-map-shell">
        <button type="button" class="journey-reset" id="journey-reset" hidden>&larr; Full map</button>
        <div class="journey-map-photo" id="journey-map-photo" hidden>
          <img id="journey-map-photo-img" alt="">
        </div>
        <div class="journey-map-loading" id="journey-map-loading">Loading map...</div>
        <svg
          class="journey-map-svg"
          id="journey-map-svg"
          role="img"
          aria-labelledby="journey-map-title"
        >
          <title id="journey-map-title">Journey map connecting Caguas, Grapevine, Arlington, Atlanta, Toronto, and Albuquerque</title>
        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>

    <aside class="journey-sidebar">
      <p class="journey-sidebar-heading">Timeline:<br>click on the stops below</p>
      <div class="journey-stops">
        <button type="button" class="timeline-stop" data-stop="pr" style="--stop-color:#ef3340; --stop-tint:rgba(239, 51, 64, 0.1);">
          <div class="timeline-topline">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-city-row">
              <p class="timeline-city">Caguas, PR</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p class="timeline-label">Mi Patria</p>
          <p class="timeline-year">Early years</p>
        </button>

        <button type="button" class="timeline-stop" data-stop="chhs" style="--stop-color:#2563eb; --stop-tint:rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1);">
          <div class="timeline-topline">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-city-row">
              <p class="timeline-city">Grapevine, TX</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p class="timeline-label">Colleyville Heritage HS</p>
          <p class="timeline-year">High school</p>
        </button>

        <button type="button" class="timeline-stop" data-stop="uta" style="--stop-color:#f97316; --stop-tint:rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.1);">
          <div class="timeline-topline">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-city-row">
              <p class="timeline-city">Arlington, TX</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p class="timeline-label">UT Arlington</p>
          <p class="timeline-year">Aug 2018 - May 2022</p>
        </button>

        <button type="button" class="timeline-stop" data-stop="gt" style="--stop-color:#b3a369; --stop-tint:rgba(179, 163, 105, 0.14);">
          <div class="timeline-topline">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-city-row">
              <p class="timeline-city">Atlanta, GA</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p class="timeline-label">Georgia Tech</p>
          <p class="timeline-year">Aug 2022 - Present</p>
        </button>

        <button type="button" class="timeline-stop" data-stop="tor" style="--stop-color:#dc2626; --stop-tint:rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.1);">
          <div class="timeline-topline">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-city-row">
              <p class="timeline-city">Toronto, ON</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p class="timeline-label">64<sup>th</sup> American Control Conference</p>
          <p class="timeline-year">2024</p>
        </button>

        <button type="button" class="timeline-stop" data-stop="snl" style="--stop-color:#0f766e; --stop-tint:rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.1);">
          <div class="timeline-topline">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-city-row">
              <p class="timeline-city">Albuquerque, NM</p>
              <span class="timeline-badge">Upcoming</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p class="timeline-label">Sandia National Laboratories</p>
          <p class="timeline-year">Summer 2026</p>
        </button>
      </div>
    </aside>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="../files/journey/js/d3.min.js"></script>
<script src="../files/journey/js/topojson-client.min.js"></script>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var WIDTH = 1480;
  var HEIGHT = 720;
  var GEO_URL = '../files/journey/data/countries-110m.json';
  var US_STATES_URL = '../files/journey/data/us-states.json';
  var OVERVIEW = { center: [-86.5752, 31.7951], scale: 1080 };
  var stops = [
    {
      id: 'pr',
      city: 'Caguas, PR',
      label: 'Home',
      countryId: '630',
      coordinates: [-66.0485, 18.2341],
      zoom: { center: [-66.0485, 18.2341], scale: 2450 },
      year: 'Early Years',
      role: 'Home, culture, and resilience',
      description: 'My upbringing in Caguas, Puerto Rico and my experience as an immigrant in Texas shaped my values, my drive, and my desire to connect with others and build community wherever I go.',
      color: '#ef3340',
      tint: 'rgba(239, 51, 64, 0.1)',
      highlightFill: 'rgba(239, 51, 64, 0.18)',
      emoji: '🇵🇷',
      image: '../files/journey/stops/pr.webp',
      imageFit: 'cover',
      overviewLabel: { anchor: 'middle', x: 0, emojiY: -30, labelY: -14 }
    },
    {
      id: 'chhs',
      city: 'Grapevine, TX',
      label: 'CHHS',
      stateName: 'Texas',
      coordinates: [-97.1031, 32.8874],
      zoom: { center: [-97.1031, 32.8874], scale: 2100 },
      year: 'High school',
      role: 'Colleyville Heritage High School',
      description: 'Grew up in the Christmas capital of Texas: my wonderful Grapevine, TX.\n\nAt Colleyville Heritage High School, I graduated 15th out of 495 students in my class and was recognized as both a National Merit Scholar and a National Hispanic Scholar.',
      color: '#2563eb',
      tint: 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1)',
      highlightFill: 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.18)',
      emoji: '🏫',
      image: '../files/journey/stops/chhs.webp',
      imageFit: 'cover',
      overviewLabel: { anchor: 'end', x: -14, emojiY: -24, labelY: -8 }
    },
    {
      id: 'uta',
      city: 'Arlington, TX',
      label: 'UT Arlington',
      stateName: 'Texas',
      coordinates: [-97.1081, 32.7357],
      zoom: { center: [-97.1081, 32.7357], scale: 1750 },
      year: 'Aug 2018 - May 2022',
      role: 'Honors B.S. in Electrical Engineering & Full Ride Scholarship',
      description: 'UT Arlington is where I found my love of research.\n\nI defended my honors thesis, graduated summa cum laude as an electrical engineering honors scholar, and got minors in mathematics and physics.\n\nMost imporatnly, I got my early research experiences under the mentorship of Dr.Yan Wan and Dr. Frank Lewis.',
      color: '#f97316',
      tint: 'rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.1)',
      highlightFill: 'rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.2)',
      emoji: '🎓',
      image: '../files/journey/stops/uta.jpg',
      imageFit: 'cover',
      overviewLabel: { anchor: 'start', x: 14, emojiY: -22, labelY: -8 }
    },
    {
      id: 'gt',
      city: 'Atlanta, GA',
      label: 'Georgia Tech',
      stateName: 'Georgia',
      coordinates: [-84.3963, 33.7756],
      zoom: { center: [-84.3963, 33.7756], scale: 1850 },
      year: 'Aug 2022 - Present',
      role: 'Ph.D. in Robotics, FACTS Lab',
      description: 'Getting my Ph.D in beautiful Atlanta, GA.\n\nDoing research in safe autonomy, nonlinear control for quadrotor UAVs, teaching undergraduate students, and co-founding BORI to connect with my roots.',
      color: '#b3a369',
      tint: 'rgba(179, 163, 105, 0.14)',
      highlightFill: 'rgba(179, 163, 105, 0.24)',
      emoji: '🐝',
      image: '../files/journey/stops/gt.jpg',
      imageFit: 'cover',
      overviewLabel: { anchor: 'start', x: 16, emojiY: -10, labelY: 5 }
    },
    {
      id: 'tor',
      city: 'Toronto, ON',
      label: 'ACC 2024',
      countryId: '124',
      coordinates: [-79.3832, 43.6532],
      zoom: { center: [-79.3832, 43.6532], scale: 1950 },
      year: '2024',
      role: 'Presented ACC paper in Toronto',
      description: 'I presented my paper, "Newton-Raphson Flow for Aggressive Quadrotor Tracking Control," at the 2024 American Control Conference in Toronto.',
      color: '#dc2626',
      tint: 'rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.1)',
      highlightFill: 'rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.18)',
      emoji: '📄',
      image: '../files/journey/stops/tor.png',
      imageFit: 'cover',
      overviewLabel: { anchor: 'middle', x: 0, emojiY: -30, labelY: -14 }
    },
    {
      id: 'snl',
      city: 'Albuquerque, NM',
      label: 'Sandia',
      stateName: 'New Mexico',
      coordinates: [-106.6504, 35.0844],
      zoom: { center: [-106.6504, 35.0844], scale: 1800 },
      year: 'Summer 2026',
      role: 'Incoming intern at Sandia National Laboratories',
      description: 'This upcoming summer I will be in Albuquerque, New Mexico for an internship at Sandia National Laboratories.',
      color: '#0f766e',
      tint: 'rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.1)',
      highlightFill: 'rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.18)',
      emoji: '🔬',
      upcoming: true,
      image: '../files/journey/stops/snl.png',
      imageFit: 'cover',
      overviewLabel: { anchor: 'middle', x: 0, emojiY: -30, labelY: -14 }
    }
  ];

  var journeyLines = [
    ['pr', 'chhs'],
    ['chhs', 'uta'],
    ['uta', 'gt'],
    ['gt', 'tor'],
    ['tor', 'gt'],
    ['gt', 'snl']
  ];

  var DEFAULT_DETAIL_TITLE = 'Select a stop';
  var DEFAULT_DETAIL_COPY = 'Every stop shaped how I work and who I am. Click a marker or stop to zoom in.';
  var activeId = null;
  var zoomed = false;
  var currentCenter = OVERVIEW.center.slice();
  var currentScale = OVERVIEW.scale;
  var animationFrame = null;
  var worldFeatures = [];
  var stateFeatures = [];

  var svg = d3.select('#journey-map-svg');
  // Set viewBox via JS because Quarto/Pandoc lowercases the HTML attribute
  // to "viewbox", which SVG does not recognise (it requires camelCase "viewBox").
  document.getElementById('journey-map-svg').setAttribute('viewBox', '0 0 ' + WIDTH + ' ' + HEIGHT);
  var loading = document.getElementById('journey-map-loading');
  var resetButton = document.getElementById('journey-reset');
  var detail = document.getElementById('journey-detail');
  var detailYear = document.getElementById('journey-detail-year');
  var detailTitle = document.getElementById('journey-detail-title');
  var detailBadge = document.getElementById('journey-detail-badge');
  var detailRole = document.getElementById('journey-detail-role');
  var detailCopy = document.getElementById('journey-detail-copy');
  var timelineStops = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.timeline-stop'));
  var photoCard = document.getElementById('journey-map-photo');
  var photoImg = document.getElementById('journey-map-photo-img');

  var countryLayer = svg.append('g');
  var stateLayer = svg.append('g');
  var routeLayer = svg.append('g');
  var markerLayer = svg.append('g');

  function easeInOutCubic(t) {
    return t < 0.5 ? 4 * t * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 3) / 2;
  }

  function isDarkMode() {
    return document.body.classList.contains('quarto-dark');
  }

  function getStop(id) {
    return stops.find(function (stop) { return stop.id === id; }) || null;
  }

  function buildProjection() {
    return d3.geoMercator()
      .center(currentCenter)
      .scale(currentScale)
      .translate([WIDTH / 2, HEIGHT / 2]);
  }

  function animateTo(targetCenter, targetScale) {
    if (animationFrame) {
      cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrame);
    }

    var startCenter = currentCenter.slice();
    var startScale = currentScale;
    var startTime = performance.now();
    var duration = 900;

    function frame(now) {
      var t = Math.min((now - startTime) / duration, 1);
      var eased = easeInOutCubic(t);

      currentCenter = [
        startCenter[0] + (targetCenter[0] - startCenter[0]) * eased,
        startCenter[1] + (targetCenter[1] - startCenter[1]) * eased
      ];
      currentScale = startScale + (targetScale - startScale) * eased;

      renderMap();

      if (t < 1) {
        animationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
      } else {
        animationFrame = null;
      }
    }

    animationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }

  function updateDetail(stop) {
    if (detailYear) {
      detailYear.textContent = stop.year;
      detailYear.style.color = stop.color;
    }
    if (detailTitle) {
      detailTitle.textContent = stop.city;
    }
    if (detailRole) {
      detailRole.hidden = false;
      detailRole.textContent = stop.role;
    }
    if (detailCopy) {
      detailCopy.textContent = stop.description;
    }
    if (detail) {
      detail.style.borderColor = stop.color + '55';
      detail.style.backgroundColor = stop.tint;
    }

    if (detailBadge) {
      if (stop.upcoming) {
        detailBadge.hidden = false;
        detailBadge.style.backgroundColor = stop.tint;
        detailBadge.style.color = stop.color;
      } else {
        detailBadge.hidden = true;
      }
    }
  }

  function resetDetail() {
    if (detailTitle) {
      detailTitle.textContent = DEFAULT_DETAIL_TITLE;
    }
    if (detailRole) {
      detailRole.hidden = true;
      detailRole.textContent = '';
    }
    if (detailCopy) {
      detailCopy.textContent = DEFAULT_DETAIL_COPY;
    }
    if (detail) {
      detail.style.borderColor = '';
      detail.style.backgroundColor = '';
    }
    if (detailBadge) {
      detailBadge.hidden = true;
    }
  }

  function updateTimeline() {
    timelineStops.forEach(function (button) {
      button.classList.toggle('is-active', button.getAttribute('data-stop') === activeId);
    });
  }

  function updatePhoto(projection) {
    var stop = getStop(activeId);
    var svgEl = document.getElementById('journey-map-svg');
    if (!zoomed || !stop || !stop.image) {
      photoCard.hidden = true;
      return;
    }

    var cardWidth = 188;
    var cardHeight = 128;
    var point = projection(stop.coordinates);
    var renderedWidth = svgEl ? svgEl.clientWidth : WIDTH;
    var renderedHeight = svgEl ? svgEl.clientHeight : HEIGHT;
    var scaleX = renderedWidth / WIDTH;
    var scaleY = renderedHeight / HEIGHT;
    var left = point[0] * scaleX + 18;
    var top = point[1] * scaleY - 140;

    left = Math.max(10, Math.min(left, renderedWidth - cardWidth - 10));
    top = Math.max(10, Math.min(top, renderedHeight - cardHeight - 10));

    photoImg.src = stop.image;
    photoImg.alt = stop.city;
    photoImg.style.objectFit = stop.imageFit || 'contain';
    photoImg.style.objectPosition = stop.imagePosition || 'center';
    photoCard.style.left = left + 'px';
    photoCard.style.top = top + 'px';
    photoCard.hidden = false;
  }

  function renderMap() {
    if (!worldFeatures.length || !stateFeatures.length) {
      return;
    }

    var activeStop = getStop(activeId);
    var projection = buildProjection();
    var path = d3.geoPath(projection);
    var defaultCountryFill = isDarkMode() ? '#2a2a2a' : '#c8cdd5';
    var defaultStroke = isDarkMode() ? '#3a3a3a' : '#a0a8b4';
    var routeStroke = isDarkMode() ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.15)';

    countryLayer
      .selectAll('path')
      .data(worldFeatures)
      .join('path')
      .attr('class', 'map-country')
      .attr('d', path)
      .attr('fill', function (feature) {
        return activeStop && activeStop.countryId === String(feature.id)
          ? activeStop.highlightFill
          : defaultCountryFill;
      })
      .attr('stroke', function (feature) {
        return activeStop && activeStop.countryId === String(feature.id)
          ? activeStop.color
          : defaultStroke;
      })
      .attr('stroke-width', function (feature) {
        return activeStop && activeStop.countryId === String(feature.id) ? 1.5 : 0.5;
      });

    stateLayer
      .selectAll('path')
      .data(stateFeatures)
      .join('path')
      .attr('class', 'map-state')
      .attr('d', path)
      .attr('fill', function (feature) {
        return activeStop && activeStop.stateName === feature.properties.name
          ? activeStop.highlightFill
          : 'transparent';
      })
      .attr('stroke', function (feature) {
        return activeStop && activeStop.stateName === feature.properties.name
          ? activeStop.color
          : defaultStroke;
      })
      .attr('stroke-width', function (feature) {
        return activeStop && activeStop.stateName === feature.properties.name ? 1.5 : 0.5;
      });

    routeLayer
      .selectAll('path')
      .data(journeyLines.map(function (segment) {
        return {
          type: 'Feature',
          geometry: {
            type: 'LineString',
            coordinates: [
              getStop(segment[0]).coordinates,
              getStop(segment[1]).coordinates
            ]
          }
        };
      }))
      .join('path')
      .attr('class', 'route-line')
      .attr('d', path)
      .attr('stroke', routeStroke)
      .attr('opacity', zoomed ? 0 : 1);

    var markers = markerLayer
      .selectAll('g')
      .data(stops, function (stop) { return stop.id; })
      .join(function (enter) {
        var group = enter.append('g')
          .attr('class', 'map-stop')
          .attr('tabindex', 0)
          .attr('role', 'button');

        group.append('circle').attr('class', 'stop-ring');
        group.append('circle').attr('class', 'stop-core');
        group.append('text').attr('class', 'marker-emoji');
        group.append('text').attr('class', 'marker-city');
        group.append('text').attr('class', 'marker-label');

        return group;
      });

    markers
      .attr('data-stop', function (stop) { return stop.id; })
      .attr('transform', function (stop) {
        var point = projection(stop.coordinates);
        return 'translate(' + point[0] + ',' + point[1] + ')';
      })
      .classed('is-active', function (stop) {
        return stop.id === activeId;
      })
      .style('--stop-color', function (stop) {
        return stop.color;
      })
      .on('click', function (event, stop) {
        selectStop(stop.id, true);
      })
      .on('keydown', function (event, stop) {
        if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
          event.preventDefault();
          selectStop(stop.id, true);
        }
      });

    markers.select('.stop-ring')
      .attr('r', function (stop) {
        return stop.id === activeId ? 13 : 9;
      });

    markers.select('.stop-core')
      .attr('r', function (stop) {
        return stop.id === activeId ? 6 : 4;
      });

    markers.select('.marker-emoji')
      .attr('display', zoomed ? 'none' : null)
      .attr('text-anchor', function (stop) {
        return stop.overviewLabel.anchor;
      })
      .attr('x', function (stop) {
        return stop.overviewLabel.x;
      })
      .attr('y', function (stop) {
        return stop.overviewLabel.emojiY;
      })
      .text(function (stop) {
        return stop.emoji;
      });

    markers.select('.marker-city')
      .attr('display', function (stop) {
        return zoomed && stop.id === activeId ? null : 'none';
      })
      .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
      .attr('x', 0)
      .attr('y', 28)
      .text(function (stop) {
        return stop.city;
      });

    markers.select('.marker-label')
      .attr('display', function (stop) {
        return zoomed && stop.id === activeId ? null : null;
      })
      .attr('text-anchor', function (stop) {
        if (zoomed && stop.id === activeId) {
          return 'middle';
        }
        return stop.overviewLabel.anchor;
      })
      .attr('x', function (stop) {
        if (zoomed && stop.id === activeId) {
          return 0;
        }
        return stop.overviewLabel.x;
      })
      .attr('y', function (stop) {
        if (zoomed && stop.id === activeId) {
          return 43;
        }
        return stop.overviewLabel.labelY;
      })
      .text(function (stop) {
        return zoomed && stop.id === activeId ? stop.label : stop.label;
      });

    markers.each(function (stop) {
      if (zoomed && stop.id !== activeId) {
        d3.select(this).select('.marker-label').attr('display', 'none');
      }
    });

    resetButton.hidden = !zoomed;
    updatePhoto(projection);
  }

  function selectStop(id, shouldZoom) {
    var stop = getStop(id);
    if (!stop) {
      return;
    }

    activeId = id;
    updateDetail(stop);
    updateTimeline();

    if (shouldZoom) {
      zoomed = true;
      animateTo(stop.zoom.center, stop.zoom.scale);
    } else {
      renderMap();
    }
  }

  function zoomOut() {
    activeId = null;
    zoomed = false;
    resetDetail();
    updateTimeline();
    animateTo(OVERVIEW.center, OVERVIEW.scale);
  }

  resetButton.addEventListener('click', zoomOut);

  timelineStops.forEach(function (button) {
    button.addEventListener('click', function () {
      selectStop(button.getAttribute('data-stop'), true);
    });
  });

  new MutationObserver(function () {
    renderMap();
  }).observe(document.body, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });

  Promise.all([
    d3.json(GEO_URL),
    d3.json(US_STATES_URL)
  ]).then(function (results) {
    var worldData = results[0];
    var statesData = results[1];

    worldFeatures = topojson.feature(worldData, worldData.objects.countries).features;
    stateFeatures = statesData.features;

    loading.hidden = true;
    resetDetail();
    updateTimeline();
    renderMap();
  }).catch(function () {
    loading.hidden = false;
    loading.textContent = 'Map failed to load.';
  });
});
</script>
```
